h1: Custom Tote Bags for Branding, Promotions & Everyday Carry
metaDescription: Design custom tote bags with your logo. Perfect for promotions, events, and employee gifts. Fast turnaround. Bulk discounts. Order now.
introHtml:
Marketing directors, HR directors, safety managers, and business owners: if you need a promotional item that gets carried everywhere, custom tote bags are the answer. They serve as walking billboards, visible at grocery stores, trade shows, and offices. Whether you want a sturdy canvas bag for a corporate giveaway or a lightweight polyester style for a retail promotion, our selection covers every use case.

Our inventory includes over 15 styles like the Abe™ Tote, Ike™ Tote, and Aurora Tote. Options range from budget-friendly polyester to premium canvas with full-color print. Many bags feature interior pockets, zippered closures (Zippin Tote, Color Zip Tote), and reinforced handles. If you need a bag for heavy loads, the Grocery Tote or Mallard Tote offers durability. For a professional look, the Executive Tote and Franklin™ Tote work well for corporate gifts.

We ship across the United States with typical lead times of 10–15 business days after art approval. Minimum order quantities start at 50 units for simple screen prints and 100 units for full-color digital transfers. Request a quote or order a sample to see the material quality firsthand. Our account managers can help you pick the right bag and decoration method for your budget and timeline.

faqs.q: What decoration methods are available for custom tote bags?
faqs.a: We offer screen printing, embroidery, and full-color digital transfer printing. Screen printing works best for simple logos with 1–4 colors. Embroidery gives a professional, textured look ideal for corporate bags. Full-color digital transfers are great for complex artwork or photographs.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom tote bags?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities vary by style and decoration method. Typically, screen-printed orders start at 50 bags. Full-color digital transfers require a minimum of 100 bags. Embroidery minimums start at 75 units. Contact us for specific product MOQs.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a large order?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer sample orders. You can request a blank or decorated sample of most tote bags. Samples are charged at cost plus shipping, and we refund the sample fee if you place a production order within 30 days.

faqs.q: How long does production typically take?
faqs.a: Standard production lead time is 10–15 business days after art approval. Rush orders can be expedited to 5–7 business days for an additional fee. Shipping time depends on your location and chosen carrier.

faqs.q: What sizes and materials are available?
faqs.a: Our tote bags come in small (10x10"), medium (15x15"), and large (18x18") sizes. Materials include 100% cotton canvas, polyester, recycled PET, and non-woven polypropylene. Each product page lists exact dimensions and material specifications.

heroAltText: Assorted custom tote bags on a table, including canvas and polyester styles with printed logos, suitable for promotional events and corporate gifts.
